Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 09

Video.summary: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 11

Video.summary: Reidy attends a deja vu rescue. A boy is missing. Lifeguards deal with blue bottle invasions and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 07

Video.summary: The lifeguards put their lives on the line in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 07

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: Jesse fractures his spine and Jake rescues a beginner surfer being smashed against cliffs.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 13

Video.summary: Mouse accidentally turns off his radio, putting lives at risk. The shark alarm is set off.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a number of mass rescues. Trainee Harrison is tasked with counting the people on the beach.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 11

Video.summary: A brawl takes place at the North end. Tommy and Harries attempt a number of rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 08

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards perform CPR on a man initially complaining of chest pains who suddenly has a cardiac arrest.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 09

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: A suspected body is sighted in the water. Ryan bogs the buggy. Jethro dislocates his shoulder on the jet ski.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 09

Video.summary: A man falls off the jetski rescue mat. Crowds swell to 40,010 so Hoppo must decide whether to clear the water.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 01

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Trainee Lachie completes his first big solo rescue. The team farewell one of their most dedicated lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 12

Video.summary: The lifeguards deal with drowning boogie boarders. Jesse gets a buoy rope stuck in the jetski intake.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jackson administers the EpiPen for anaphylactic shock and Chase and Max go fishing on jetskis.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: On New Year's Day lifeguards handle drunk beachgoers. Harries faces a career-defining challenge with a baby.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 04

Video.summary: After 2 years Bondi has reopened and the lifeguards manage 30,010 beachgoers.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 01

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: A local surf photographer aids in saving a tourist. 'Jewellery Rescue' search for a missing wedding ring.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 04

Video.summary: Maxi responds to a tunnel fire. Harrison and Jethro attend to a girl found facedown with no pulse.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 12

Video.summary: Maxi risks his life to rescue two fishermen. Jethro rescues tourists from rips, then collapses on the beach.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 10

Video.summary: An American tourist needs CPR after being pulled unconscious from the ocean in calm waters.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 01

Video.summary: Lifeguards search for a couple who were washed off rocks. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 06

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: Maxi juggles both lifeguarding and firefighting, as the other lifeguards face rescues with language barriers.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 09

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: Monks go missing, a bluebottle sting turns serious and a young cancer patient becomes "lifeguard for the day".
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 07

Video.summary: Bondi reopens. Lifeguards rescue a paraglider and try to fix the buggy. Lifeguard Max Milligan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 01

Video.summary: Max attends shark net rescue. Lifeguards handle skate park injuries and rescue struggling swimmers.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 03
